title: Trade & Transport
description: Trade & Transport is a modular Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that improves villager trading and transportation mechanics. Every feature can be individually toggled in-game to fit your preferred playstyle.
body:
Trade & Transport is a modular Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that improves villager trading and transportation mechanics. Every feature can be individually toggled in-game to fit your preferred playstyle.

### **Features**

* **Villager Buckets:** Pick up and transport villagers using a standard bucket. The bucket safely retains the villager's trades, level, and custom name.  
* **Stackable Curing:** Reverts the 1.20.2 curing nerf. Zombie villager curing discounts can once again stack up to 5 times for maximum trade discounts.  
* **Trade Cycling:** Adds a dedicated cycle button to the merchant screen. This allows you to easily reroll the trades of a Level 1 villager with zero experience without needing to repeatedly break and place their workstation.  
* **Guaranteed Zombie Conversion:** Villagers killed by zombies will always convert into zombie villagers, regardless of your world's difficulty setting.

### **Configuration**

All features are enabled by default. You can toggle each of these four mechanics on or off at any time using the in-game configuration menu.

### **Dependencies**

To run this mod and access the settings screen, you must install the following dependencies:

* Fabric API (Required)  
* YetAnotherConfigLib / YACL (Required)  
* Mod Menu (Optional)
